recent_news.title: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
recent_news.summary: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.
recent_news.body_text:
A JPMorgan Chase -led group of banks cut their exposure to a private credit fund co-managed by KKR days before the asset manager announced it was spending $300 million to prop up the troubled vehicle.
The fund, FS KKR Capital Corp ., said Monday in a release that KKR will inject $150 million into the fund as equity and spend another $150 million to buy shares from investors who want to exit.

recent_news.title: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 12%
recent_news.summary: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
recent_news.body_text:
Whirlpool shares tumbled Thursday after the iconic appliance maker warned that the Iran war triggered a severe downturn, underscoring how sharply higher fuel prices and collapsing consumer confidence are beginning to weigh on big-ticket purchases.
"War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said in

recent_news.title: Apollo CEO Rowan warns of market correction, slams 'egregious' practices at rival insurers
recent_news.summary: Apollo CEO Marc Rowan warned that markets face an elevated risk of unexpected shocks, saying he is positioning the firm defensively for an expected correction.
recent_news.body_text:
Apollo Global Management CEO Marc Rowan on Wednesday warned investors that he is preparing his giant asset management firm for a potential market downturn and sharply criticized what he called the "egregious" practices of some rival insurers.
The current solid economic backdrop — which helped Apollo report a banner quarter, in which the firm reached $1 trillion in assets under management and recor

recent_news.title: Anthropic CEO warns of cyber ‘moment of danger’ as AI exposes thousands of vulnerabilities
recent_news.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned AI has created a narrow window for software firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of vulnerabilities.
recent_news.body_text:
Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei warned Tuesday that artificial intelligence has created a narrow window for the world's tech firms, governments and banks to fix tens of thousands of software vulnerabilities found by his company's latest model.
That AI model, Mythos, was previewed last month along with the disclosure that it had unearthed decades-old vulnerabilities in crucial software.

recent_news.summary: "The idea that everything will finally go right in the Middle East seems like a real stretch to me," Cramer said.
recent_news.body_text:
CNBC's Jim Cramer said Friday that the market's become "incredibly overconfident" following the Iran-U.S. ceasefire news, which caused a massive rally in stocks this week.

recent_news.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
recent_news.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
recent_news.body_text:
Visa is launching six new tools using artificial intelligence to modernize the process of disputing credit card charges, the company told CNBC exclusively.
The digital payments company said the tools are designed to reduce the costs and frustration of "outdated" dispute processes for multiple entities involved in the payments process: merchants, issuers and acquirers.
